prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **mStallion 2.0L Turbo GDi (m200T4)** with a **Garrett GTX3582R** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegate to handle 2.2 bar (32 psi) of boost, supported by a **Pusher Motorsports** custom billet aluminum intake manifold with 80mm throttle body and **ID1000** fuel injectors for 450+ HP on E85.

Drivetrain: Install a **Quaife ATB LSD (part # QDF7J)** in the rear axle to eliminate torque steer from the **Getrag MPS6 6-speed DCT**, reinforced with **South Bend Clutch Stage 3** twin-disc ceramic clutch (rated for 600 lb-ft) and **UUC Motorwerks** short-shift kit (25% reduction in throw).

Suspension: Full **Öhlins Road & Track DFV** coilovers (custom valved for XUV700 chassis) with **Whiteline** adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and **SuperPro** poly bushings (part # SPF1000K) to eliminate body roll, paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston 380mm** front and **4-piston 355mm** rear brake kits with **Ferodo DS2500** pads.
estetica: Aero: **Liberty Walk LB Works** widebody kit (XUV700-specific, 50mm extended fenders) with **Seibon Carbon** hood (vented, 3kg weight reduction) and **Rocket Bunny** rear diffuser (dual 3.5" exhaust cutouts for **Akrapovič Evolution** titanium cat-back system).
Lighting: **Lux H8 Angel Eyes** (6000K) with **Morimoto XB LED** fog lights (5500K) and **DRLs**, paired with **Vland** sequential LED taillights (dynamic turn signals, 1200 lumens).

Interior: **Recaro Sportster CS** front seats (XUV700-specific mounts) with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, **Momo Mod.70** flat-bottom steering wheel (350mm, quick-release hub), and **AEM X-Series** digital dash (replaces stock cluster, 7" touchscreen with boost/AFR logging).
